meta.note: Euler EulerClaims merkle-drop. Each index pays out a multi-token basket (WETH + DAI + USDC + COMP + ...). balance_eth shows the WETH portion only. Claim tx: claimAndAgreeToTerms(acceptanceToken, index, merkle_tokens, merkle_proof). acceptanceToken = keccak256(abi.encodePacked(msg.sender, terms_hash)).
